extraction.one_line_summary: ALAPHILIPPE Julien won stage 6 in photo finish against MUEHLBERGER after early 13-minute break, outsprinting Muehlberger after nearly crashing on final descent.
tactical_patterns: ALAPHILIPPE attacked breakaway companions 3km from climb summit but couldn't drop MUEHLBERGER, revealing limits against bigger riders on steep gradients.
DE MARCHI accelerated on steepest 11%+ section to neutralize attacks, correctly anticipating descent would favor patient positioning over summit attacks.
MUEHLBERGER refused to lead out sprint despite tactical position, allowing ALAPHILIPPE back into contention after near-crash on descent grass verge.
JUMBO-VISMA peloton control allowed 13+ minute gap, showing team prioritizes preserving leader over stage hunting when GC secure.

rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julien: positive: Nearly crashed on descent grass but still won sprint, showing exceptional bike handling recovery under pressure
rider_signals.MUEHLBERGER Gregor: negative: Failed to capitalize on leading sprint position, indecisive tactics cost him stage win against more experienced finisher
rider_signals.DE MARCHI Alessandro: positive: Strongest on steepest 11%+ gradients, attacking there dropped companions temporarily before being re-caught on easier gradient
rider_signals.YATES Adam: neutral: Team allowed massive gap showing confidence in GC position, rode defensively within peloton throughout stage
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: negative: Dropped from top-5 GC, losing time suggests poor form or mechanical issues earlier in stage
